text:
# KOCHI METRO RAIL LTD
(A joint venture Company of Govt. of India and Govt. of Kerala)
Ref : KMRL/HR/2024-25/07 Date: 09/07/2024
Kochi Metro Rail Limited (KMRL) a 50:50 Joint Venture of Government of India and Government
of Kerala incorporated for the implementation of the Kochi Metro Rail project in Kochi and for its
operation & Maintenance intends to appoint the following official:-
Name of the Post : DIRECTOR (FINANCE)
Date of vacancy : 01.10.2024
Pay Scale of the Post : Rs.180000 - 340000 (IDA) and other allowances/
perks/privilege.
Duration of Appointment : The appointment will be on Deputation/ contract basis for a
period of 5 years, or up to the date of superannuation,
whichever is earlier.
## 1. Job description and responsibilities
The incumbent shall be a member of the Board of Directors of KMRL and will report to
the Managing Director of the Company.
He/ she will be responsible for all Finance related work in KMRL. He/ she will be the
overall in-charge of Finance, Accounts, Audit functions and fund management of the
organization and shall be responsible for –
a) Improving and implementing a comprehensive financial management plan
b) Providing operational oversight from finance/ accounts angle for overall project
implementation
c) Coordinating the consolidation of the annual, short and long term financial plans,
budgets, forecasts; preparing, analyzing and reporting the results to the
management
d) Optimizing deployment and ensuring adequacy of financial resources during the
implementation of the project
e) Appraisal of financial risks and remedial actions
f) Coordination with Govt. of India, Govt. of Kerala, financial institutions in India and
overseas.
He/ she shall also may have to oversee and supervise some other general administration
functions of KMRL.

## 2. Eligibility (to be reckoned as on 01.10.2024)
(I) Age: As on 01.10.2024
Age limit as on date of vacancy
Minimum (in years) Maximum age (In years)
45 Years as on 01.10.2024 57 Years as on 01.10.2024
Should possess 3 years of residual
service as on 01.10.2024
Age of Superannuation: 60 years for the post of Director in KMRL
(II) Educational Qualification
The applicant should have the qualification of CA / CMA / MBA (Finance) or
equivalent*
*MBA / Equivalent must be a full time 2-year course, from a University / Institute
recognized by the UGC / Accreditation body. Preference would be given to
Chartered Accountants.
OR
Officers of organized Group A Accounts Services (i.e. Indian Audit & Accounts
Service, Indian Defence Accounts Service, Indian Railways Accounts Service,
Indian Civil Accounts service, Indian P &T Accounts & Finance Service and
Indian Cost Accounts Service)
(III) Work Experience (To be reckoned as on 01.10.2024)
(1) At least 25 (Twenty-Five) years post qualification experience in Project Finance/ Finance
and Accounts/ Audit/ setting up Financial, Accounting and Audit systems and procedures
in a large public or private sector organizations of repute.
(2) Candidate should have knowledge and experience in managing financial and
accounting software.
(3) Candidate should be well versed with the Indian accounting standards including
developments related to taxation, investment and portfolio management, raising of
funds, tendering and contracting..
(4) Should have proven ability to handle related functions independently and lead a team of
finance & accounting.
(5) Individuals with experience and knowledge in securing funds from external agencies and
its management will be preferred.
(IV) Required Professional Experience and minimum requirements on the scale of pay:
(To be reckoned as on 01.10.2024)
## A. Applicant from Govt. Organizations
Should be Member of Group "A" Accounts Service of Government of India with overall 25
years of post – qualification work experience as mentioned above.

text:
Officers should have worked at least for a period of 2 years in the level 14 of the 7th CPC or
Senior Administrative Grade (SAG) (with Grade Pay of Rs.10000 in Pay Band 4 of CDA
Grade of Rs. 37400-67000 (pre-revised) or higher
## B. Applicant from PSUs:
Should have overall 25 years of post - qualification work experience as mentioned above.
Should have worked at least 2 years in the pay scale of Rs. 120000 – 280000 or Rs 51300-
73000 (Pre-revised IDA) or higher.
## C. Applicant from Private Sector:
Should have overall 25 years of post -qualification work experience as mentioned above.
Should have worked in companies where the project size of not less than Rs 1000 Crore or
a company with an annual turnover of not less than Rs 500 Crore in the last 3 years for which
the documentary proof of company's Project size / turnover to be attached along with
experience proof.
In the preceding 7 years, should have worked at least 5 years in a level reporting directly to a
Director on the Board i.e. one level below Board level with last drawn minimum CTC of
Rs.36.00 lakhs per annum. Proof of Organizational hierarchy, depicting the same should be
attached along with payslips/IT returns for proof of CTC.
## 3. Submission of application
Applicants should send their application, as per the
enclosed Format (Annexure I)
(a) Application in the enclosed format (Annexure-I) giving details about
qualification, experience and career achievements (in a separate sheet)
along with self-attested copies of testimonials in support of age, qualification
and experience, should reach at the undermentioned address, positively by
06th August 2024 5.00 pm in hard copy, duly super scribing on the envelope
as "Application for the post of Director (Finance)"
(b) Candidates presently employed in Government or Public Sector
Undertakings (PSUs), should forward their applications through proper
channel along with their ACRs/ APARs of the last five years, so as to reach
the under mentioned address, by the stipulated date. Advance copy of the
applications will be entertained before the stipulated due date, only if the
applications is forwarded through proper channel within 15 days of the last
date of submission of application.
(c) The Disciplinary and Vigilance Clearance of the Candidates certified by the
present employer should also be enclosed.
The last date of receipt of complete application in hard copy in KMRL shall be 06th August 2024.

No application shall be entertained under any circumstances after the stipulated date.
Incomplete applications, applications not in format, applications received after the stipulated
date, shall be REJECTED. KMRL reserves the right to shortlist the applicants for interview. The
decision of the selection committee shall be final.
The candidates shortlisted for the interview will be advised through email and shall be eligible
for reimbursement of to and fro, economy class air fare, or, AC 2 tier railway fare.
Applications should be addressed to the:
General Manager (HR, Admn & Training).
Kochi Metro Rail Ltd.,
JLN Metro Station, 4th Floor, Kaloor, Ernakulam Kerala – 682017
